{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323150248C248B5170AF558BFE561"}"},"total":62},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7592902077025174297","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"2025年代智库精英情报分析师魂穿夺舍民国军统小特工（黄埔军校毕业生），系统是情报扫描分析，抓捕日谍得到系统奖励技能和新情报[笑哭]这简直是系统喂饭","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":27,"text":"黄埔军校","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BB%84%E5%9F%94%E5%86%9B%E6%A0%A1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177424936858BFE561%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227592902077025174297%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227592215304080460824%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BB%84%E5%9F%94%E5%86%9B%E6%A0%A1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767867148,"group_id":"7592215304080460824","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6+CUObw8yWd3uJc0w7oW3o=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"103288177801","user_name":"红尘过客沈无忧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"103288177801","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592215304080460824","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越成军统特务处的一名边缘小特务，陆长安本想苟全性命于乱世。但当他集中注意力时，世界在他眼中变了样：
看向路边乞讨的老瞎子—— 【身份：日军王牌间谍】 【今日情报：如果不抓他，三小时后他将炸毁兵工署的运钞车。】
看向高高在上的总务科长—— 【身份：戴老板的同乡】 【弱点：贪财好色，刚挪用公款在夫子庙包养了外室。】
看向风华绝代的上海滩名伶—— 【好感度：-50（她想杀你）】 【真实阵营：红色】
于是，陆长安悟了。
在这个人鬼难测的谍战世界里，情报就是生命，先知就是无敌！
从金陵城的“抓谍狂魔”，到上海滩的“青帮新贵”； 从特高课南造云子口中的“帝国挚友”，到戴老板眼里的“国士无双”。
陆长安穿着最昂贵的西装，喝着最烈的洋酒，游走在黑白之间。 手里拿着日本人的赏金，反手就送他们去见天照大神。
有人问他：你到底是谁？ 陆长安掸了掸烟灰，微微一笑：“我？我只是一个做点小生意的爱国商人罢了。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/74a5c02f35e0e60e91c055559975b0f1","author":"洛天歌","author_id":"","book_id":"7592215304080460824","book_name":"民国谍影：我能看到情报词条！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":518,"name":"特工","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=518&name=特工&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592215684780671512","read_count":"44169","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"420140"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.1","serial_count":"164","tags":"抗战谍战,都市,系统,穿越,无敌,特工","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o80be8b0c394c267aa59c9a4a5a00b0b7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433368&x-signature=3OQQHVXtChyCXZlAXpX4JUxhY%2Bc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1020777059325261","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323150248C248B5170AF558BFE561"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_c
